column1: # Beckhoff EL3162 — 2-channel analog input, 0..10 V, 16-bit single-ended.
# NOTE: the EL3162 ESI descriptor is NOT present in ethercat/esi/ (only
# EL3602 differential-10V and EL3xxx-0030 family shipped). Values below
# come from Beckhoff public documentation + EL31xx family defaults. When
# the real ESI is added, cross-check RevisionNo and EBusCurrent and
# ProductCode 0x0C5A3052 is the documented EL3162 identity. CoE is
# supported (mailbox present) so unlike EL1809/EL2809 this terminal *can*
# take 0x8000/0x8010 filter + range config via SDO.
# Process data — 2 channels, each channel publishes {Status u16, Value i16}
# Per-channel filter / range presets (0x80x0). CoE-writable at PreOp; the
# TSV carries the most common operating values — 50 Hz (IIR2), range code
# for 0..10V. Adjust per-channel via the CLI `ec_sdo_write` if needed.
